items.title: Parse proposal comment syntax (arrows and plain text lines) in proposal-to-backlog.ts
items.description: This TODO lives in the core autonomous pipeline's proposal parser, which is a direct dependency of the backlog-scoring loop itself. Fixing comment-syntax parsing unblocks correct proposal ingestion and likely enables the sibling fix at line 209 to be applied cleanly. Core pipeline correctness outranks documentation.

items.title: Strip '-->' arrow from parsed proposal output in proposal-to-backlog.ts
items.description: Closely related to rank-1 item and in the same file; both touch the proposal comment-parsing logic. Fixing the arrow-stripping ensures downstream consumers (including this scorer) receive clean proposal text rather than raw comment syntax. Should be batched with rank-1 item in the same agent session to minimize cost.

items.title: Add one-sentence description of the autonomous loop to plans doc
items.description: Pure documentation touch with no functional impact on the running system; cheapest item in the sprint and low risk. Ranks last because it neither unblocks other items nor addresses a regression. Still worth including given the negligible cost and the fact that plan documents serve as onboarding context for future autonomous cycles.
